## Summary

Brief description of the changes and why they're needed.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup

## Test Plan

Describe how you tested these changes.

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run test` passes
- [ ] Documentation updated (if applicable)
